stat.title: Walk-off Winners
stat.subtitle: Games won on a walk-off play.

notableEvents.label: Victor Bericoto walk-off
notableEvents.detail: Victor Bericoto homers (2) on a fly ball to center field.

notableEvents.label: Fernando Tatis Jr. walk-off
notableEvents.detail: Fernando Tatis Jr. homers (2) on a line drive to left field.

notableEvents.label: Bryce Eldridge walk-off
notableEvents.detail: Bryce Eldridge hits a grand slam (4) to right field. Matt Chapman scores. Rafael Devers scores. Jung Hoo Lee scores.

notableEvents.label: Braden Montgomery walk-off
notableEvents.detail: Braden Montgomery homers (1) on a fly ball to left field. Andrew Benintendi scores.

notableEvents.label: Ketel Marte walk-off
notableEvents.detail: Ketel Marte homers (11) on a fly ball to left field.

notableEvents.label: Miguel Vargas walk-off
notableEvents.detail: Miguel Vargas homers (13) on a fly ball to left center field. Drew Romo scores.

notableEvents.label: Randy Arozarena walk-off
notableEvents.detail: Randy Arozarena doubles (16) on a line drive to center fielder Ryan Waldschmidt. J.P. Crawford scores. Josh Naylor to 3rd.

notableEvents.label: Colton Cowser walk-off
notableEvents.detail: Colton Cowser homers (3) on a fly ball to right center field. Blaze Alexander scores.

notableEvents.label: Heriberto Hernández walk-off
notableEvents.detail: Heriberto Hernández hits a grand slam (2) to center field. Esteury Ruiz scores. Liam Hicks scores. Xavier Edwards scores.

notableEvents.label: Blake Dunn walk-off
notableEvents.detail: Umpire reviewed (tag play), call on the field was upheld: Blake Dunn reaches on a fielder's choice, fielded by shortstop Masyn Winn. Spencer Steer scores. Dane Myers to 2nd.

notableEvents.label: Edgar Quero walk-off
notableEvents.detail: Edgar Quero homers (1) on a fly ball to center field. Chase Meidroth scores.

notableEvents.label: Carson Benge walk-off
notableEvents.detail: Carson Benge reaches on a fielder's choice, fielded by left fielder Max Schuemann. Marcus Semien scores. Luis Torrens to 2nd.

notableEvents.label: Spencer Torkelson walk-off
notableEvents.detail: Spencer Torkelson doubles (9) on a line drive to right fielder Jesús Sánchez. Matt Vierling scores. Zach McKinstry to 2nd. Spencer Torkelson to 1st.

notableEvents.label: Daulton Varsho walk-off
notableEvents.detail: Daulton Varsho hits a grand slam (5) to left field. George Springer scores. Vladimir Guerrero Jr. scores. Kazuma Okamoto scores.

notableEvents.label: Brice Turang walk-off
notableEvents.detail: Brice Turang homers (6) on a fly ball to center field.

notableEvents.label: Javier Sanoja walk-off
notableEvents.detail: Javier Sanoja reaches on a throwing error by third baseman Coby Mayo. Joe Mack scores.

notableEvents.label: Michael Busch walk-off
notableEvents.detail: Michael Busch walks. Nico Hoerner scores. Alex Bregman to 3rd. Seiya Suzuki to 2nd.

notableEvents.label: Alec Bohm walk-off
notableEvents.detail: Alec Bohm out on a sacrifice fly to center fielder Drew Gilbert. Adolis García scores.

notableEvents.label: Spencer Torkelson walk-off
notableEvents.detail: Spencer Torkelson homers (2) on a line drive to left center field.

notableEvents.label: Max Muncy walk-off
notableEvents.detail: Max Muncy homers (4) on a fly ball to right center field.

notableEvents.label: Gavin Sheets walk-off
notableEvents.detail: Gavin Sheets homers (2) on a fly ball to right center field. Jackson Merrill scores. Manny Machado scores.

notableEvents.label: Xander Bogaerts walk-off
notableEvents.detail: Xander Bogaerts hits a grand slam (2) to left field. Jake Cronenworth scores. Jackson Merrill scores. Manny Machado scores.

notableEvents.label: Nolan Schanuel walk-off
notableEvents.detail: Nolan Schanuel out on a sacrifice fly to left fielder Randy Arozarena. Adam Frazier scores.

notableEvents.label: Brent Rooker walk-off
notableEvents.detail: Brent Rooker homers (2) on a fly ball to left field. Shea Langeliers scores. Tyler Soderstrom scores.

notableEvents.label: Nick Yorke walk-off
notableEvents.detail: Nick Yorke doubles (1) on a sharp line drive to left fielder Dylan Beavers. Bryan Reynolds scores. Ryan O'Hearn to 3rd.

notableEvents.label: Owen Caissie walk-off
notableEvents.detail: Owen Caissie homers (1) on a line drive to right center field. Javier Sanoja scores.

notableEvents.label: Luis Robert Jr. walk-off
notableEvents.detail: Luis Robert Jr. homers (1) on a fly ball to left center field. Bo Bichette scores. Jorge Polanco scores.
